input:
Muhammad ibn Maslamah went ahead with his horses until he arrived at a place called Marr al-Ẓahrān, which was only about one day’s travel, on camel’s back, from Makkah. He found there a few men from the Quraysh who questioned him about his mission and why he had so many horses with him. His answer was: “God’s Messenger (peace be upon him) will encamp here tomorrow, God willing.” They also noticed that Bashīr ibn Saʿd had a large quantity of arms with him.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 32: A Second Trip to Makkah

output.scene_title: Muhammad Ibn Maslamah Arranges Meeting in Makkah
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 32: A Second Trip to Makkah

characters.name: Muhammad ibn Maslamah
characters.appearance: Mid 30s, medium olive skin, athletic build. Dark brown beard, neatly trimmed. Wearing off-white tunic, beige woolen cloak, plain red head cloth. Worn leather sandals. Confident, calm expression.

characters.name: Bashir ibn Sa'd
characters.appearance: Late 30s, darker skin tone, lean build. Short dark beard, no hint of grey. Wearing simple white tunic, plain brown cloak, white cloth wrapped as a turban. Worn leather sandals. Dignified, serious expression.

output.moral_lesson: The path to success often requires careful planning and secrecy.
output.narrative_text: Muhammad ibn Maslamah arrived at Marr al-Ẓahrān, near Makkah, with a group of horses. When some Quraysh men asked about his mission, he told them that the Prophet would be camping there the next day. Meanwhile, Bashir ibn Sa'd had a large quantity of arms with him.

compliance.notes: Scene takes place away from the Prophet, so no depiction rule is required for him.

output.image_prompt: Whimsical illustration of a 7th century Makkah desert landscape. Muhammad ibn Maslamah, a slender man in his mid-30s with dark brown beard and off-white tunic, rides a horse with a group of others. In the distance, a group of older Arab men in simple white tunics and brown cloaks, one with a large quantity of arms, are seen speaking and questioning him. Sunlight casts long shadows across the desert. Medium shot, eye level. Earthy tones. No modern objects.
